channel.title: Blogs on Vighnesh Nilajakar
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Vighnesh Nilajakar

item.title: Debloating Windows
item.author: vighneshnilajakar2@gmail.com (Vighnesh Nilajakar)
item.description: Introduction Now, that we have installed Windows 10, We need to Debloat it. It is stuffed with Useless Applicatons and Packages, Used for Telemetry. Also, We will be able to make it faster as Lesser Resources will be used. Anyone can use this Guide even if you were already using your Windows Machine or If you are on Windows 11.
item.dc:creator: Vighnesh Nilajakar

item.title: Installing Windows
item.author: vighneshnilajakar2@gmail.com (Vighnesh Nilajakar)
item.description: Introduction It's an Unfortunate Event but it has happened, I have Installed Windows 10. Destroying all my FOSS Principles, I installed this Proprietary piece of Software. Just for you, Also to see how an Optimized Version of Windows works in Comparision to Linux and to fit into My Colleges Systems. Linux For an entire Year I was using Linux, What a Beautiful Experience, Hoping through Operating Systems, Optimizing it according to my needs and then Hoping on to other just to Explore its Beauty and to lose some of my Data while Trasitioning.
item.dc:creator: Vighnesh Nilajakar

item.title: Package Management
item.author: vighneshnilajakar2@gmail.com (Vighnesh Nilajakar)
item.description: Introduction Installing Applications in Windows isn't Secure. We either download executable files from some Websites or from The Microsoft Store where many Applications are Paid or Unavailable. Also, Installing Executables from some Random Websites, Makes updating them a pain in the ass and nor these Executable Files Verified. Also with The Microsoft Store, You don't get the entire fleet of Applications to Install.
item.dc:creator: Vighnesh Nilajakar
